title: Feature: Swarm Code Generation Quality Improvements (P0 + P2 + P3)
description: Improve LLM code generation quality in the hex dev swarm pipeline. P0 enriches the coder prompt with explicit file paths, project structure, available imports, and strict mode rules. P2 adds fixer loop detection. P3 adds file path sanitization. P1/P4/P5 deferred to follow-up.

phases.name: P0: Coder Prompt Enrichment
phases.description: Inject project structure, explicit file paths, available imports, and strict mode into coder prompt

phases.name: P2: Fixer Loop Detection
phases.description: Detect repeated identical fixer output and escalate model or regenerate

phases.name: P3: File Path Sanitization
phases.description: Validate and sanitize LLM-generated file paths before writing to disk

phases.name: Verification
phases.description: Build check and manual test with hex dev start

steps.description: Add fetch_project_structure() to CodePhase — walks the output_dir and returns a formatted directory tree string. For each existing file, show the path. For the target file, append '← WRITE THIS FILE'. Cap at 80 entries to stay within token budget.
steps.done_condition: Function returns formatted tree string; unit test passes with mock directory

steps.description: Add fetch_available_imports() to CodePhase — for TypeScript: read all .ts files in src/core/domain/, src/core/ports/ and extract exported symbols (types, interfaces, functions) via regex. Return formatted 'Available imports:' block with concrete import paths. For other languages, return empty.
steps.done_condition: Function returns import block; regex extracts 'export interface Foo', 'export type Bar', 'export function baz'

steps.description: Enhance execute_step() user_message to include: (a) explicit 'Write the file: <path>' instruction, (b) project structure from step-1, (c) available imports from step-2, (d) TypeScript strict mode instructions when language=typescript. Insert these between the step description and existing context.
steps.done_condition: Rendered user_message contains all four sections; existing tests still pass

steps.description: Add strict_mode_rules() helper that returns language-specific strictness instructions. For TypeScript: 'strict TypeScript, no `any` types, use `import type` for type-only imports, all relative imports use .js extension'. For Rust: 'no unsafe, no unwrap in library code'. For Go: 'handle all errors, no blank identifier for errors'.
steps.done_condition: Function returns appropriate string per language

steps.description: Add fixer output hashing to supervisor run_tier(). After each fixer execution, compute SHA-256 of the fixer's output (the generated code). Store in a HashMap<Objective, Vec<String>> keyed by objective. If the latest hash matches the previous hash for that objective, increment a 'stuck_count' counter.
steps.done_condition: stuck_count increments when hashes match; resets when hash differs

steps.description: Add escalation logic in run_tier() triggered by stuck_count. At stuck_count >= 2: log warning, request model upgrade via selector.upgrade_model(). At stuck_count >= 4: log error, clear fixer state, re-dispatch hex-coder (not fixer) with compile errors injected into the coder prompt for full regeneration.
steps.done_condition: Escalation triggers at correct thresholds; log messages appear

steps.description: Add sanitize_file_path() function in hex-cli/src/pipeline/code_phase.rs (or a shared util). Strip \n, \r from path. Reject paths containing '..', starting with '/', or containing null bytes. Call this in infer_target_file() before returning and in the worker file write path in agent.rs.
steps.done_condition: Malformed paths rejected with descriptive error; clean paths pass through unchanged

steps.description: Run cargo check --workspace to verify no compile errors. Run cargo test -p hex-cli to verify existing tests pass. Manually test with hex dev start on a sample workplan to verify enriched prompts appear in logs.
steps.done_condition: cargo check clean, cargo test passes, enriched prompt visible in logs
